## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- [ ] Focused change (single logical topic)
- [ ] No unrelated refactors

## Validation

List exact commands run and results.

```bash
# Example
make
make test
```

- [ ] Build/test evidence included
- [ ] If behavior changed, expected vs actual outcome documented

## Documentation

- [ ] Docs updated for behavior/interface/user-workflow changes
- [ ] No doc updates needed (explain why)

## Risk

- [ ] Risk areas identified
- [ ] Rollback path clear
